name: codex-telegram-remote
description: Run Codex from Telegram with a tappable project picker and completion notifications.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex from Telegram and receive completion messages
interface.longDescription: Codex Telegram Remote runs a local Telegram bot that lets approved chats select a Codex project, send normal Telegram messages as Codex prompts, continue jobs when Codex asks a question, and receive completion notifications from both Telegram-launched jobs and regular Codex sessions through an opt-in Stop hook.
defaultPrompt: Set up Telegram remote control for Codex
